nasb.text: So when David returned from killing the Philistine, Abner took him and brought him before Saul with the Philistine’s head in his hand.

esv.text: And as soon as David returned from the striking down of the Philistine, Abner took him, and brought him before Saul with the head of the Philistine in his hand.

cnv.text: 大衛擊殺了那非利士人回來的時候，押尼珥迎接他，把他帶到掃羅面前，大衛手中還拿著那非利士人的頭。

ccb.text: 大卫杀了歌利亚回来，押尼珥就把他带到扫罗那里，他手上还拿着那非利士人的头颅。
